neighborhoods.name: Costa del Este Centro
neighborhoods.description: Modern planned district with wide avenues, corporate offices, international schools, and shopping malls

housing.predominantType: Modern high-rise condos and luxury apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Panama City. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Santa Maria Golf & Country Club
neighborhoods.description: Gated golf community within Costa del Este with Jack Nicklaus course and luxury residences
neighborhoods.character: Luxury gated golf, Jack Nicklaus course, exclusive

housing.predominantType: Luxury houses, golf villas, and premium condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Panama City's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Juan Diaz
neighborhoods.description: Working-class area south with commercial development, Metro access, and much lower costs
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Panama Pacifico
neighborhoods.description: Former US military base converted into modern community with international schools and tax incentives
neighborhoods.character: Former military base, tax zone, modern international

housing.predominantType: Modern houses, apartments, and planned community homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City
